description_long: This is a sleek, open-cockpit Formula-style sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a prominent rear wing for downforce. The body is primarily white with blue accents and features the Renault branding along the sides and nose, as well as Bridgestone on the front wing. The car has exposed wheels with low-profile racing tires and intricate multi-spoke rims, optimized for high-speed performance. The front features a pointed nose cone and wide front wing, while the rear is dominated by a large, angular spoiler and visible suspension components. The cockpit is single-seated, with a roll hoop behind the driver and minimalistic side mirrors. The overall design emphasizes speed, agility, and advanced engineering, typical of high-performance racing vehicles.
description: A white and blue Formula-style Renault sports car with an open cockpit, large rear wing, and exposed racing wheels. The design is aerodynamic and built for high-speed urban or track environments.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the large rear wing, exposed suspension, and wide rear tires.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the Renault branding, aerodynamic bodywork, and open cockpit.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the pointed nose, wide front wing, and Bridgestone branding.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, with visible cockpit and rear wing structure.
